latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
latest.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

latest.title: Week 3 Assignment: EC2 (Ubuntu) + IAM + Security + Billing | AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp 2026
latest.description:
Completed Week 3 Hands-On Assignment for AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp 2026!
Built a fully secure Ubuntu EC2 web server with Nginx, created IAM users + group with custom least-privilege policy (allow start/stop/reboot, deny terminate), set up $5 monthly billing alerts, attached IAM role, and validated permissions with Access Denied proof.
#AWS #CloudClubUnilorin #Bootcamp2026 #EC2 #IAM

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: AI Runtime Assurance
latest.description: AI Runtime Assurance is a black-box recorder for AI agents on AWS. It captures HTTP requests, AWS API actions, and file operations, then turns them into one session-level security report with evidence, severity scores, and plain-English explanations. It uses Amazon Bedrock when available and falls back cleanly when it is not.

latest.title: Implement monthly data refresh for an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL database with reduced downtime
latest.description: Explained how to automate the completely fresh data loading of an Aurora database at the end of each month, which is essential for maintaining an up-to-date and accurate database

latest.title: Performing internal Vulnerability Assessment on a private EC2 instance using Tenable Nessus in AWS
latest.description:
This guide demonstrates how to deploy and scan a target EC2 instance inside a private subnet using Tenable Nessus. It covers instance configuration, application deployment using user data, secure access via AWS Systems Manager, hostname resolution, and credentialed scanning setup.

By the end of this lab, you will have a working internal scanning setup that reflects common cloud security practices in AWS environments.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: VERA, A Multi-Agent Triage System for Healthcare in Chile
trending.description: A multi-agent healthcare triage system that screens patients in Chilean Spanish, detects crisis signals, and generates clinical reports. Built by two people on AWS for $17/month, designed to integrate with Chile's public health system via HL7 FHIR.

trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.
